create_a_new_secret_in_aws_secrets_manag: Create a new secret in AWS Secrets Manager from a provided credential or generated value. Use to register app credentials, API keys, or DB passwords centrally.
integrate_aws_secrets_manager_into_the_w: Integrate AWS Secrets Manager into the workflow. Can retrieve, create, update, list, and delete secrets.
list_secrets_in_aws_secrets_manager_and_: List secrets in AWS Secrets Manager and report metadata like last-changed and rotation status. Use for hygiene checks and finding stale secrets.
maximum_number_of_results_to_return: Maximum number of results to return
pagination_token_for_the_next_page: Pagination token for the next page
schedule_deletion_of_a_secret_in_aws_sec: Schedule deletion of a secret in AWS Secrets Manager with a recovery window so it can be restored if needed. Use to retire unused or rotated-out credentials safely.
staging_labels_attached_to_this_version: Staging labels attached to this version
update_a_stored_secret_in_aws_secrets_ma: Update a stored secret in AWS Secrets Manager with a new value as part of a rotation flow. Use to push refreshed credentials without manual console edits.
